data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SCIM sync run state and failure visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the SCIM sync run state and failure visibility, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes, but do not address the specific need for SCIM sync run state visibility. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: SCIM sync run state and failure visibility are not validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify SCIM sync run state and failure visibility.
